title: Anadelphia funerea
taxonomy: Anadelphia funerea belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is a type of grass native to tropical Africa. It is classified as a perennial herb, typically growing in humid environments. Anadelphia funerea is further categorized as a member of the subfamily Panicoideae. Its classification is also supported by its anatomical characteristics, such as its leaf and stem structure.
